audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. The polynomial construction V(x)=S(x^64) where S zeros at γ^(64c) for each missing cell c mathematically guarantees V evaluates to zero at exactly the 64 FFT points {c, c+128, ..., c+63*128} corresponding to that cell's evaluation domain, and nonzero elsewhere. Verified through bit-reversal indexing and FFT domain analysis.
